title: psychotria subspathulata
intro: Psychotria subspathulata is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the wild coffee or mountain coffee, native to Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, alleviate fever, and treat various gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Psychotria subspathulata include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to protect against infections, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Psychotria subspathulata typically involve drying and processing the leaves, which can be brewed as a tea or used in capsules for medicinal purposes.
